SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'MaxClients') AS MaxClientsValue, cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'DatabasePath') AS DatabasePathValue;
WITH ParametersValue AS (SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort') AS Port) SELECT Port FROM ParametersValue WHERE Port > 1000;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort') AS ServerPort FROM DUAL) AS Subquery WHERE ServerPort IS NOT NULL;
SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort') AS ServerPortValue FROM virtuoso_ini WHERE section = 'Parameters';
SELECT DISTINCT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Sections', 'SectionOne') FROM DUAL WHERE cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Sections', 'SectionOne') IS NOT NULL;

CREATE TABLE test_settings (setting_name VARCHAR, setting_value VARCHAR); INSERT INTO test_settings (setting_name, setting_value) VALUES ('ServerPort', cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort')); SELECT * FROM test_settings;
SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort') AS Port, (SELECT cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'MaxClients')) AS MaxClients FROM DUAL;
SELECT CASE WHEN cfg_item_value(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS IsServerPortConfigured;
